nodes.label: Always restart PM2 after resurrect
nodes.rationale: PM2 resurrect restores saved processes but may use cached code. Always run pm2 restart all after a system restart to ensure latest code is loaded.

nodes.label: Shared cache architecture
nodes.rationale: Per-user Linux isolation causes massive storage duplication. Shared directories with symlinks eliminate duplication while maintaining isolation.

nodes.label: User isolation mechanism
nodes.rationale: Each user gets an isolated Linux system account with home directory permissions 750. OpenCode instances run as the user's system account.

nodes.label: Backend health check pattern
nodes.rationale: curl http://localhost:3000/api/health returns JSON status. Used in deployment verification and start scripts to confirm backend readiness.
